title: PROP-FEED-S4-016 Rust test does not snapshot id structure or block_type assignment for spec's canonical fixture
description: verification-architecture.md §13 line 759 specifies the canonical Sprint 4 PROP-FEED-S4-016 fixture: parse_markdown_to_blocks('# heading\\n\\nparagraph'). The behavioral-spec.md line 759 says 'parse_markdown_to_blocks(\"# heading\\n\\nparagraph\") の Rust 出力を JSON 化し、TS 側 parseMarkdownToBlocks 出力と手動比較する'. The current implementation prop_s4_016_parse_markdown_to_blocks_basic_cases (line 628) tests SIX disconnected cases (empty, single paragraph, two paragraphs, heading, bullet, code) but NEVER tests the exact spec fixture '# heading\\n\\nparagraph'. Each case asserts only on isolated properties (non-empty Vec, blocks[0].content == 'hello world', etc.) — there is no JSON snapshot of the structural payload, no assertion on id naming scheme (block-0, block-1, ...) which is a known divergence risk from TS, and no assertion that ('# heading\\n\\nparagraph') produces exactly two blocks of types Heading1 and Paragraph in order. Per spec line 640: 'Sprint 4 ゲートでは基本ケーススナップショット 1 ペアの PASS をもって Phase 5 gate を満たすとする' — the test must be a snapshot of the canonical fixture, not a scattered set of structural sniffs.
evidence: feed_handlers.rs:644-668: tests six cases independently, none of which is exactly '# heading\\n\\nparagraph'. Spec line 759 (behavioral-spec.md) is unambiguous about the fixture.\n\nspec line 278 (verification-architecture.md): 'Rust snapshot test + vitest snapshot test'. The Rust side here is not a snapshot — there is no fixture-vs-output equality assertion.
remediation: Add a single test case test_parse_markdown_to_blocks_canonical_snapshot that asserts: let blocks = parse_markdown_to_blocks('# heading\\n\\nparagraph').unwrap(); assert_eq!(blocks.len(), 2); assert_eq!(blocks[0].block_type, BlockTypeDto::Heading1); assert_eq!(blocks[0].content, 'heading'); assert_eq!(blocks[1].block_type, BlockTypeDto::Paragraph); assert_eq!(blocks[1].content, 'paragraph'). Optionally serialize to JSON with id stripped and snapshot-compare. Pair with the missing parserParity.test.ts (FIND-S4-IMPL-001) to enforce parity.
